text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Matikanetannhauser and Twin Turbo are
doing a joint dance practice, so I head to the
park where they're meeting up.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Let's begin! It's Machitan and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Dance Master Turbo's...

text_block_list.name: Machitan & Turbo
text_block_list.text: Heart-pumping, high-speed dance practice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I'm ready, Turbo! But why are we in a
park today?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... Well, there are some veeery deep
reasons!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
For starters... there's tons of space to dance! Plus,
the sun feels super nice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Okay, so what kind of practice
are we doing?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll do some crazy wild dance moves! And
then we'll get into a crazy wild rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! Crazy, wild dance moves and a crazy,
wild rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Machitan & Turbo
text_block_list.text: Tan-tan ta tan-tan... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a loss as to why they need to do this in
unison, but I guess it's fine if they're having fun. I
watch them silently, until...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Is that Machitan and Dance Master Turbo?
What are you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi there. We're practicing our dancing right
now.

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Looks fun! Hey! Can we join in?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course! Let's all sing and dance together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Woo, now things are getting exciting! Ooh, ooh! I
know! Since we're all here, why don't we bust out
a new practice routine?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it! But what kind?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What do you think we should do, Mr. Trainer
Assistant?
choice_data_list: Why not combine dancing with a game?
The best way to learn is by teaching!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What do you think we should do, Ms. Trainer
Assistant?
choice_data_list: Why not combine dancing with a game?
The best way to learn is by teaching!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I get it! If you're having fun, you'll learn the dance
moves without even thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone! We're playing dance tag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's just like regular tag, but you can only move
using dance steps! What do you think? Who
wants to try?!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: I do! I do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll be "it" to start. Make sure you stay in
rhythm when you're running away!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ready? Don't let Machitan catch you, guys!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and Twin Turbo get in some
good dance practice by playing with the children.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmm.... I think a name change for our practice is
in order!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: It's Machitan and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Dance Master Turbo's...

text_block_list.name: Machitan & Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hyped-up dance class for good kids everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things start to feel a little like a kids' TV show,
but it seems that teaching has helped them get a
firmer grip on their own dancing.
